events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Hello, it's his birthday!
angles.copy: Happy 77th birthday to the legend that is Lionel Richie! What's your favourite track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Want to Have Fun (and cake)
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking that unique style and those incredible anthems. Which one is on your playlist today?

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter George Michael was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Remembering a legend
angles.copy: Today, we remember the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63. His voice and songwriting continue to inspire. What's your favourite George Michael track?

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and dancer Michael Jackson died on June 25, 2009.

angles.name: Remembering the King of Pop
angles.copy: On this day 17 years ago, we lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His music and iconic performances left an indelible mark on the world. What's your top MJ track?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, and songwriter Ringo Starr was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo!
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From The Beatles to his All-Starr Band, his rhythm is undeniable. Send him some peace and love today!

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Brian May! His iconic guitar work with Queen continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and film producer Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling!
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary frontman, Mick Jagger! Still commanding the stage after all these decades. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed the Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV launched and changed the music world forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the very first video played. What impact did MTV have on you?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: A Britpop masterpiece
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis unleashed 'Definitely Maybe' upon the world. An album that defined a generation and Britpop. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, and Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What's your favourite performance from the legendary festival?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: American singer and actor Elvis Presley died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day 49 years ago, the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley. His music continues to captivate across generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: American rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Remembering a Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost the influential hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and legacy continue to resonate. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: American guitarist, singer, and songwriter Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: The Guitar God's Legacy
angles.copy: On this day 56 years ago, the world said goodbye to the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix. His revolutionary guitar playing changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album 'Abbey Road' on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album, Iconic Cover
angles.copy: It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as famous as the songs within. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American-British singer, songwriter, and musician Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The powerhouse voice of The Pretenders, still rocking after all these years. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Another Year, Still Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The iconic voice of Britpop. What's your top track from the man himself?

events.title: 51 years since John Lennon released Imagine (UK Single)
events.blurb: John Lennon's single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1975.

angles.name: A Timeless Message
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK. A truly timeless message of peace and unity. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was released
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: Music in your pocket
angles.copy: It's 25 years since Apple launched the original iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How did the iPod change the way you listened to music?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, not stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all the iconic theme tunes that have accompanied his adventures. What's your favourite Bond theme?
